news.title: Badgers head to Wisconsin’s capitol
news.summary_en: The annual UW–Madison Day at the State Capitol highlighted the university's economic power and campus momentum.

news.title: 48 faculty honored with Vilas professorships and awards
news.summary_en: The awards recognize standout research, teaching and service.

news.title: 4 UW scholars honored with Vilas Research Professorships
news.summary_en: New Vilas Research Professors include leaders in study of cells, public opinion, sustainable chemistry and computational optimization
